Description:
# 1. Tong quan & Bói cảnh (Overview & Context)
## Problem
Nguoi dung can dang nhap nhanh va lay thong tin tai khoan dang hoat dong.
---
## Pain Points
- Khong co phien dang nhap thi khong the truy cap tinh nang
- Can co JWT de goi API
---
## Business Value
- Xac thuc tin cay
- Truy cap phan quyen dung vai tro
---
## Actors
### Primary Actor
User (ADMIN/LECTURER/STUDENT)
---
## User Story Statement
La mot Nguoi dung, toi muon dang nhap de he thong cap JWT va tra ve thong tin user hien tai.
---
# 2. User Flow
## 2.1 Luong chinh: Login
1. User nhap email/password
2. Client goi POST /api/auth/login
3. Backend tra accessToken + user
4. Client luu token va goi GET /api/auth/me
---
# 3. Exception Flow
## EF-01 – Sai mat khau
Tra 401 va thong bao sai thong tin dang nhap
---
# 4. Acceptance Criteria
## AC-01 – Dang nhap thanh cong
Given thong tin hop le When login Then tra accessToken va user
---
# 5. API
POST /api/auth/login
GET /api/auth/me
---
# 6. Database Table
N/A (doc tu bang Users)
---
# 7. Business Rule
Token phai duoc dinh kem cho cac API can xac thuc.

# 1. Tong quan & Bói cảnh (Overview & Context)
## Problem
Can tao tai khoan moi cho nguoi dung theo role.
---
## Pain Points
- Dang ky thu cong gay mat thoi gian
- Thieu thong tin studentId/department khi can
---
## Business Value
- Onboarding nhanh
- Du lieu day du
---
## Actors
### Primary Actor
User dang ky
---
## User Story Statement
La mot Nguoi dung, toi muon dang ky tai khoan de su dung he thong.
---
# 2. User Flow
## 2.1 Luong chinh: Register
1. User nhap thong tin
2. Client goi POST /api/auth/register
3. Backend tao user va tra ve thong tin
---
# 3. Exception Flow
## EF-01 – Email da ton tai
Tra 409 va thong bao email da duoc su dung
---
# 4. Acceptance Criteria
## AC-01 – Dang ky thanh cong
Given thong tin hop le When register Then tao user moi va tra ve du lieu
---
# 5. API
POST /api/auth/register
---
# 6. Database Table
Users
---
# 7. Business Rule
Role phai nam trong danh sach cho phep.

Summary: Role based route and API protection
Description:
# 1. Tong quan & Bói cảnh (Overview & Context)
## Problem
Can kiem soat truy cap theo vai tro.
---
## Pain Points
- Truy cap sai role co the lo du lieu
---
## Business Value
- Bao mat he thong
- Dung phan quyen
---
## Actors
### Primary Actor
ADMIN/LECTURER/STUDENT
---
## User Story Statement
La mot Quan tri, toi muon he thong gioi han truy cap theo role.
---
# 2. User Flow
## 2.1 Luong chinh: RBAC
1. Client gui JWT
2. Backend validate JWT
3. Guard kiem tra role
---
# 3. Exception Flow
## EF-01 – Khong co quyen
Tra 403 Forbidden
---
# 4. Acceptance Criteria
## AC-01 – Dung role moi duoc truy cap
Given role hop le When goi API Then truy cap duoc
---
# 5. API
Tat ca endpoint can auth
---
# 6. Database Table
Users (role)
---
# 7. Business Rule
Role guard bat buoc cho endpoint nhay cam.
